headline: We're live. And we're different.
subtitle: Founder spots open now. 90-day window.
caption:

headline: Your platform is stealing from you.
subtitle: Swipe to see the math. $18,000/year difference.
caption:
Let's do some math real quick.

You make $10K/month creating content.
OnlyFans takes $2,000.
Fansly takes $2,000.
OpenFans takes $500.

That's $1,500/month back in YOUR pocket.
$18,000/year. For the exact same content.

And we pay you instantly in USDC. Not in 7-21 business days whenever your bank feels like it.

Oh and if you refer your creator friends? You earn 1% of their revenue. Forever. Passively. While you sleep.

The old platforms had their moment. This is the next one.

Founder onboarding is live for 90 days. Reduced fees. Priority verification. Early access to every new feature.

Save this post. Send it to every creator you know.

headline: Your hot friends are leaving money on the table.
subtitle: 1% of everything. Forever. Just for making an intro.
caption:
This is the part nobody's talking about yet.

OpenFans has an affiliate program. And it's stupid simple:

1. Sign up as a creator
2. Share your referral link with other creators
3. Earn 1% of everything they make. Forever.

Not 1% of their first month. Not 1% up to a cap.
1% of their LIFETIME revenue on the platform.

Your friend makes $20K/month? That's $200/month for you. For sending a link.

Now multiply that by 5 friends. 10 friends. 20.

This is how the smartest creators are going to build wealth in 2026. Not just from their own content — from their network.

Founder creators get in first. 90-day window.

headline: I left OnlyFans. Here's what happened.
subtitle: $1,260 MORE in my pocket. Every single month.
caption:
Real talk for a second.

I spent 2 years building my audience on a platform that takes 20% of everything I make, holds my money for weeks, and could shut me down tomorrow if they felt like it.

I switched to OpenFans last month. Here's what changed:

I keep 95% instead of 80%.
I get paid INSTANTLY in USDC. Not in 14 days.
I don't need a bank account (which matters because try getting a bank account as a creator in some countries).
Nobody can deplatform me on a random Tuesday.

And the referral program? I told two friends. They signed up. Now I earn 1% of everything they make. Passively. Forever.

This isn't an ad. This is me telling you what I wish someone told me a year ago.

OpenFans is onboarding Founder creators for the next 90 days. Reduced fees. Priority verification. Early access to everything.

If you're a creator and you're reading this — you already know your current platform doesn't respect you. You feel it every time you check your pending balance.

Come build on something that's actually yours.

Link in @openfans.online bio. Or DM me, I'll walk you through it.

headline: Founder spots are filling up.
subtitle: 90-day window. Once it closes, it closes.
caption:
Real numbers. Real time. Founder spots are going.

Here's what Founder creators get that nobody else will:

- Reduced platform fees (already lower than everyone else)
- Priority verification (skip the line)
- Early access to every single new feature before public launch
- Direct input on platform development (we actually listen)
- Bragging rights (you were here first)

This isn't a "limited time offer" marketing trick. The Founder window is 90 days because we're onboarding our first wave of creators and giving them the best deal we'll ever offer.

When the window closes, it closes. New creators will still get 95% earnings and instant payouts — but the Founder perks are gone.

The creators who build their audience on OpenFans NOW will have a massive head start. First movers always win.

Stop thinking about it. Link in bio.

headline: Your platform can't fire you from your own page.
subtitle: Build on something they can't take from you.
caption:
They can change the terms of service tomorrow.
They can freeze your payouts "pending review."
They can ban your category with a policy update.
They can delete your page — the one you spent years building — with a single email.

And you have zero recourse. Because it was never yours.

OpenFans is built on Solana. That means:

Your content lives on decentralized infrastructure.
Your payments settle instantly in USDC — no platform can hold them.
Your account can't be suspended on a whim.
You own your creator page. Actually own it.

This isn't about being anti-OnlyFans. It's about being pro-you.

You wouldn't build a house on rented land. So why are you building a business on a platform that can evict you whenever they want?

Founder onboarding is live. 90 days to lock in the best terms we'll ever offer.

Link in bio. Or keep building on borrowed time.

headline: What OpenFans actually looks like from the inside.
subtitle: 95% earnings. Instant USDC. Clean dashboard. No surprises.
caption:
Since everyone keeps asking... here's what it actually looks like.

This is the OpenFans creator dashboard. The one that:
- Shows you 95% of every dollar, not 80%
- Has a "Withdraw Now" button that actually works NOW
- Pays in USDC (settled in 1.2 seconds on Solana)
- Has a whole referral section where you earn from your creator network

The UI is clean. The experience is fast. The math actually makes sense for once.

No pending balances sitting there for 2 weeks.
No mystery deductions.
No surprise fee increases.

Just your money. Instantly. Every time.

And that Founder badge? It means you got in during the 90-day launch window. It means reduced fees, priority verification, and early access to everything we build.

That badge is going to mean something. Get yours before they're gone.

Save this for later. Link in bio when you're ready.

caption:
